stemHtml: An aircraft’s call sign is "ABC 312" and another aircraft comes on frequency with the call sign ECHO 312. What may the controller do?

options.a: One of the aircrafts may be instructed to change the type of call sign temporarily.
options.b: Both aircraft must start to use their registrations as their call signs.
options.c: No action is required as the first part of each call sign is different.
options.d: One of the aircrafts may be asked to make up a new call sign.
